title: pasania hancei
intro: Pasania hancei, also known as Pterandra hancei, is a plant species in the family Sapindaceae. It is a tree native to Southeast Asia, valued for its medicinal properties. The plant contains various bioactive compounds, including flavonoids and terpenoids, which exhibit anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant activities, contributing to its health benefits such as wound healing, antidiarrheal, and antimalarial effects. The herbal preparations of Pasania hancei typically include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions in traditional medicine.
